title: System and method of message enhancement
abstract: The present disclosure is directed to a message enhancing system that includes computer systems and mobile devices and a communications network that operably connects the computer systems and mobile devices to one another. The computer systems and mobile devices have non-transitory processor readable mediums that each contain a message enhancing program. The message enhancing program provides a KEY input region, which upon user selection causes the message enhancing program to replace a system keyboard with an application keyboard region providing functionality to insert objects into a message. The system further includes a database operably connected to the communications network configured to store information about objects that are remotely accessible by the message enhancing program that can be used by the mobile devices and computer systems to automatically, without user intervention, communicate with one or more vendor systems via the communications network to acquire objects for insertion in an enhanced message.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A message enhancing system, comprising: one or more computer systems, each of said one or more computer systems having a first processor, a first non-transitory processor readable medium, a first input device, and a first output device; one or more mobile devices, each of said one or more mobile devices having a second processor, a second non-transitory processor readable medium, a second input device, and a second output device; a communications network operably connecting the one or more computer systems and one or more mobile devices to one another; wherein the first and second non-transitory processor readable mediums both contain a message enhancing program, the message enhancing program provides a KEY input region, which upon user selection causes the message enhancing program to replace a system keyboard with an application keyboard region providing functionality to insert objects into a message; and a database operably connected to the communications network configured to store information about objects that are remotely accessible by the message enhancing program that can be used by the mobile devices and computer systems to automatically, without user intervention, communicate with one or more vendor system via the communications network, the one or more vendor systems containing objects. 2. The system of claim 1 further comprising means within the message enhancing program to dynamically format the other data to conform with the look and feel of a third-party application before sending the other data to the third-party application represented by a sequence. 3. The system of claim 2 wherein the third-party application has a status update region in its user interface, the system further comprising a selection region including an image selection region, a tag your friends region, a link region, a what- are-you-doing region, and a check-in region and the message enhancing system being configured to recognize when the user selects one of the selection regions. 4. The system of claim 3 further comprising an exemplary image preview screen configured to allow a user to preview photo images. 5. The system of claim 4 further comprising a photo editing region configured to allow a user to edit a selected photo. 6. The system of claim 2 further comprising a music selection screen with a music selection region, a not available region, a my library region, a top ten region, an exclusive region, and a search region.
